description.content:
API for creating and managing LiveDocs, Seismic's dynamic document generation solution. LiveDocs enables automated creation of personalized sales materials by merging data from CRM systems and other sources into predefined templates. Supports generating presentations, proposals, and other dynamic content.

Contact Support:
 Name: Seismic Support
 Email: support@seismic.com
